mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.product_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, c.update_time, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS product_price, p.image_url FROM cart c JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, quantity, selected) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{selected})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, quantity, selected, create_time, update_time FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND selected = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND selected = 1
